basis: Revised 2 Jul 2026 — sharpened the 2026 Anthropic IPO event to capture a well-sourced regulatory development that broke AFTER the 30 Jun revision and is @peterxing's single most-engaged recent repost (@AnthropicAI, 30 Jun 2026 23:52 UTC, ~84k likes): the US Department of Commerce LIFTED an 18-day export-control freeze on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5 frontier models (imposed mid-June over cyber-capability national-security concerns) after Anthropic agreed to stricter security protocols and ongoing government coordination, with global access to Fable 5 restoring from 1 Jul 2026. Multiple outlets note this CLEARS A MAJOR IPO HURDLE for Anthropic, so the existing '~$1T AI-lab listing expected Q4 2026' event now reflects the cleared freeze and its probability is nudged 78->80. Sources: CNBC ('Anthropic says Trump admin has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5', 30 Jun 2026); Stocktwits ('Anthropic Clears Major IPO Hurdle As US Lifts Export Controls'); edgen.tech ('Anthropic ends 18-day standoff as US lifts export controls on 2 AI models'); plus @AnthropicAI's 30 Jun repost in @peterxing's timeline. All other predictions and the AGI-timeline anchor (genuine human-level capability by end-2026, disruptive across every industry through 2027, first superintelligent systems in the 2028-2030 window; posture 'hope for the best, but prepare for the worst') are unchanged this run, and Chapter 07's 'When' forecast stays consistent — a chip/model export-control episode does not move near-term capability timing.

years.summary: Agents go mainstream for real — embedded across enterprise workflows — even as 'agent-washing' and shaky ROI trigger the first cancellations. Open-weights models reach frontier parity, AI labs race toward $1T IPOs, Nvidia nears a $5T cap, SpaceX's record listing mints the first trillionaire, humanoid robots reach the factory floor and their makers begin going public, and the first binding frontier-model safety rules take effect. Against a cautious consensus, my own call is that AI reaches genuine human-level capability (AGI) by year-end.

events.t: AI smart glasses hit mass-market scale (Ray-Ban Meta-class tops ~10M units); display AR still premium
Autonomous taxis operate in 20+ cities
UBI pilots launch in 30+ cities worldwide
First commercial quantum computer ships
Humanoid robots top 1,000 on live factory lines (Tesla Optimus Gen 3)

First humanoid-robot IPOs hit public markets — Agility Robotics goes public via a $2.5B SPAC (Nasdaq 'AGLT'), the first US pure-play humanoid maker, as China's Unitree clears its IPO and EngineAI files in Hong Kong

Anthropic ($965B) overtakes OpenAI ($852B) and both file IPO S-1s; first ~$1T AI-lab listing expected Q4 2026 — Anthropic clears a key IPO hurdle as Commerce lifts an 18-day export-control freeze on Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5
Four-day workweek at 500+ major companies
Personalized genomic medicine goes retail
Deepfake detection mandated for platforms
AI therapy assistants cleared for clinics
SpaceX's record $1.77T IPO (largest ever) makes Musk the first trillionaire; its surging stock buys Cursor in a $60B all-stock deal
Open-weights models hit frontier parity — GLM-5.2 tops open leaderboards as DeepSeek closes a $7.4B round; China leads open source
Nvidia crosses a $5T market cap to become the world's most valuable company on AI-GPU demand; analysts project $3-4T/yr AI capex by 2030

Frontier-model pre-deployment testing goes live — OpenAI, Microsoft & xAI grant governments early-access evals as the EU AI Act's general-purpose-model rules are enforced by the European AI Office and national AI Safety Institutes
Signal: my call — human-level AGI ships by end of 2026, then a highly disruptive 2027 (not a slip to the early-2030s)

years.summary: Capability — and capital — compress. With human-level AI now shipping, its disruption ripples across every industry as AI labs cross trillion-dollar valuations, compute becomes the binding constraint, and humanoid production and fusion hit landmark milestones.

events.t: AI agents autonomously run business operations
First trillion-dollar pure-AI company
Brain-computer interfaces approved for medical use
Display AR glasses reach mainstream adoption, catalyzed by Apple's market entry
Humanoid-robot output scales toward ~1M units/yr
Fusion's first commercial plant breaks ground after SPARC's 2026 net-gain (Q≈1.5)
Compute becomes the binding constraint — hyperscalers race to gigawatt data centers and 500k+ GPU 'research-intern' fleets
Online credentials begin to surpass degrees
Regional conflict flares over water scarcity
Birth rates fall below replacement in 80% of nations
Signal: most software written end-to-end by AI

years.summary: Human-level AI has shipped and the frontier compounds fast — on my call, the first superintelligent systems emerge in the 2028–2030 window as institutions scramble to adapt the rules.

events.t: Superintelligence emerges — recursive self-improvement begins (my 2028–2030 window)
Education unbundles into personalized mastery maps
Carbon markets exceed $600B in value
DAOs gain legal recognition in 40+ jurisdictions
CRISPR therapies become routine
Cognitive-enhancement tools see mass adoption
Space-mining rights disputed at the UN
First commercial fusion electricity delivered to grid (Helion targeting 50 MW to Microsoft data center)

years.summary: The labour shock becomes undeniable — and so does the abundance dividend that could offset it.

events.t: Automation eliminates ~25% of current jobs
Loneliness declared a public-health crisis
Climate refugees exceed 120 million
Global life expectancy reaches 87
Photonic processors start replacing silicon
Social-credit systems run in 35+ countries

years.summary: The gentle-singularity branch comes into view: AI-designed medicine, universal clean energy.

events.t: AI-designed drugs gain FDA approval (170+ AI-discovered candidates now in trials; 15-20 in pivotal Phase III by 2026)
First crewed-resupply mission to a Mars base
Green energy hits universal cost parity
Companion robots enter elderly care at scale
Neural implants restore mobility
Global AI-safety treaty signed
Career half-life drops below 5 years as AI reskilling becomes universal

years.summary: Credentials quietly cross their threshold — while the room-temperature-superconductor dream stays unproven after LK-99, now chased by AI-driven materials discovery.

events.t: Micro-credentials eclipse university degrees
Ambient superconductor still unproven post-LK-99; AI accelerates the materials hunt

match.headline: Room-temperature superconductor remains unproven; AI hunts candidates

years.summary: Synthetic biology and digital money reshape the substrate of daily life.

events.t: Synthetic biology yields artificial organisms
Continuous identity & provenance verification
Digital currencies largely replace cash

years.summary: Scarcity flares at the edges even as abundance compounds at the core.

events.t: Degrees decompose into verified skill cores
Acute rare-earth shortage triggers a crisis
Biometric surveillance restricted by treaty

years.summary: The social fabric is visibly rewoven around lifelong learning and new family forms.

events.t: Marriage rates hit an all-time low
Ambient lifelong learning becomes default
First CRISPR-edited humans reach adulthood

years.summary: Artificial superintelligence emerges — the branch point everything pointed toward.

events.t: Artificial superintelligence emerges
Schools recenter on community, leadership & well-being

years.summary: Post-threshold. The question shifts from 'when' to 'who does abundance reach?'

events.t: Distribution layer becomes the defining political fight
Universal high income debated in major economies
Human–AI merger moves from fringe to policy
